turns.speaker: Linda
turns.text: Hello, thanks for calling Deriv, this is Linda, how can I assist you today?

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: Hi Linda, I'm trying to understand the leverage limits for forex trading on my account. I'm based in the UK.

turns.speaker: Linda
turns.text: Of course! For UK clients under FCA regulation, the maximum leverage for major forex pairs is 1:30 for retail clients. If you're a professional client, that can go up to 1:500.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: How do I become a professional client?

turns.speaker: Linda
turns.text: You'd need to meet at least two of three criteria: trading in significant size, a financial portfolio over €500,000, or relevant professional experience in financial services. You can apply through your account settings.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: Great, and is there a minimum deposit to get started?

turns.speaker: Linda
turns.text: There's no minimum deposit for a standard account, though some trading platforms have their own minimums. Deriv Bot requires a $5 minimum for example.

turns.speaker: Linda
turns.text: Wonderful! Is there anything else I can help with today?

turns.speaker: Linda
turns.text: My pleasure. Thanks for calling Deriv — have a lovely day!
